mapper.sql: select news_id, title, content, img, category_id, user_id, status, remark, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by from tb_news
mapper.select: SELECT n.*, u.username AS username, nc.category_name AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_comments WHERE news_id = n.news_id) AS commentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_history WHERE news_id = n.news_id) AS viewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_likes WHERE news_id = n.news_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_favorites WHERE news_id = n.news_id) AS collectCount FROM tb_news n LEFT JOIN tb_users u ON n.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_news_categories nc ON n.category_id = nc.category_id WHERE n.news_id = #{newsId}

SELECT n.*, u.username AS username, nc.category_name AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_comments WHERE news_id = n.news_id) AS commentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_history WHERE news_id = n.news_id) AS viewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_likes WHERE news_id = n.news_id) AS likeCount FROM tb_news n LEFT JOIN tb_users u ON n.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_news_categories nc ON n.category_id = nc.category_id WHERE n.status = 1
mapper.insert:
insert into tb_news
title, content, img, category_id, user_id, status, remark, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by,
#{title}, #{content}, #{img}, #{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy},
mapper.delete:
delete from tb_news where news_id in
#{newsId}
